creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
Created attachment 222067
www/privoxy: Update to 3.0.31 stable

The attached patch updates www/privoxy to 3.0.31 stable
which fixes two DoS issues and includes the bug fixes and
new features added in Privoxy 3.0.30.

The upstream changes are listed at:
https://www.privoxy.org/3.0.31/user-manual/whatsnew.html
    
Additionally the patch enables DOCS by default as it doesn't
result in added dependencies.

Tested with "poudriere testport".
